column1: Wizualization: A “Hard Magic” Visualization System for Immersive and Ubiquitous Analytics
column4: User can upload their own dataset(?) In the paper, the example used is the NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) dataset, which catalogs the health and nutritional status of adults and children in the United States
column7: They introduced WIZUALIZATION, a visual analytics system for eXtended Reality (XR)
column10: visualization story. They used visual analytics system for eXtended Reality (XR) that enables an analyst to author and interact with visualizations using a system through gestures, speech commands, and touch interaction.
column11:
Gesture recognition: Utilizing algorithms and techniques to recognize and interpret user gestures for navigation and interaction within the XR environment.
Speech recognition: Implementing speech recognition technology to interpret spoken commands and execute corresponding actions within the visualization system.
Cross-device infrastructure: Establishing a communication framework (ARCANE FOCUSES) for seamless interaction between different devices and components of the system.
Grammar of graphics for XR: Developing a set of rules and guidelines (OPTOMANCY) for creating and rendering visualizations within the XR environment, ensuring consistency and effectiveness in communication.
